hero.headline: Turn playlists into organized rehearsals and shows.
hero.subheadline: Choose your mode: stage, school, or band. One app to play better together.

cards.live_desc: For freelance musicians and live bands.
cards.live_body: Organize your setlist, align roles, and run your show with confidence.
cards.live_b3: Setlists with key, energy, and quick notes
cards.edu_desc: For music schools, teachers, and musical directors.
cards.edu_body: Turn setlists into structured rehearsals and track readiness before show day.
cards.band_desc: For bands that want tighter rehearsals and better collaboration.
cards.band_body: Plan focused rehearsals, track song progress, and keep everyone aligned.
cards.band_b4: Sync mode for rehearsals and jams

sync.title: Live synchronization for everyone
sync.body_2: Every device follows the current song automatically.
sync.line_4: Works in LIVE, EDU, and BAND modes.

compare.title: Find the mode that fits you

testimonials.title: What musicians say
testimonials.t1_quote: Stage Mode eliminated chaos on stage. I won't play a gig without it.
testimonials.t2_quote: I finally know who's prepared before rehearsal even starts.
testimonials.t3_quote: Our rehearsals became focused and productive overnight.

freemium.title: Start free. Upgrade when your band grows.

subpage.live_sub: Your stage. Your setlist. Total control.
